summary: iter301 backend testing complete. 13/13 new tests pass for /api/system/messages-log endpoint + send_system_email logging + notify_owner_multichannel hardening (cap/dedup/$type-string filter). 19/19 regression tests (biometric_auto_sync, biometric_zk_all_models, biometric_iter295_extras, notify_multichannel_iter299) also pass. Total 32/32 = 100%.
critical_code_review_comments: notification_prefs_routes.py /system/messages-log correctly aggregates 3 sources (wa_messages/system_email_logs/notifications), applies tenant scoping, per-channel filter, days-window, and category regex filter, then sorts by sent_at desc and trims to limit — verified end-to-end.
Stats aggregation is computed AFTER limit trimming (line 152-155) — semantics acceptable (matches what user sees). by_channel/by_status counts verified exact against returned items.

send_system_email now writes an audit row into db.system_email_logs on BOTH success (status=sent, provider=smtp|sendgrid) and failure (status=failed, error=<reason>|no_transport_configured) — verified.

notify_owner_multichannel enforces NOTIFY_MAX_RECIPIENTS=20 with a warning log for WhatsApp; email path caps to 20 as well. E.164 normalization via _phone_to_e164 dedupes 07XXXXXXXXX vs +9647XXXXXXXXX to one send — verified with mixed-format users.
User query for phones uses `{'phone': {'$type':'string','$ne':''}}` which safely skips docs with phone=None/missing — verified (no crash, only valid phone sent).
Authorization: /system/messages-log requires admin/manager/super_admin/branch_manager; cashier gets 403 — verified via live login.
seed_data_creation: Test suite auto-seeds and cleans up: wa_messages/system_email_logs/notifications with purpose/category prefix 'iter301_test_*' under the admin tenant, plus temp tenants 'test_iter301_msglog_cap|_dedup|_null' for hardening tests. Fixture teardown deletes all seeded docs by prefix/tenant id.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter301 endpoint /api/system/messages-log fully verified. Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_messages_log_iter301.py as regression suite for future changes to unified message logging or notify_owner_multichannel. Test data auto-cleans on fixture teardown. To add UI tests, look at data-testid=messages-log-tab in SuperAdmin.js + MessagesLogCard component (frontend testing was explicitly skipped this round).
